# Metrics

<!-- Code generated by `go generate ./...`; DO NOT EDIT. -->

This document is generated from `internal/api/metrics_catalog.go`.
Custom metrics are exposed on the Prometheus scrape endpoint: `/metrics`.

## Supported Custom Metrics

| Name | Type | Labels | Help |
|---|---|---|---|
| `headtotails_requests_total` | `counter` | `method, path, status` | Total number of HTTP requests handled by headtotails. |
| `headtotails_request_duration_seconds` | `histogram` | `method, path` | Duration of HTTP requests handled by headtotails. |
| `headtotails_grpc_errors_total` | `counter` | `grpc_code` | Total number of gRPC errors returned by headscale. |

## Metric Notes

- `headtotails_requests_total`: path uses the chi route pattern when available to avoid high-cardinality labels from dynamic IDs.
- `headtotails_request_duration_seconds`: uses default Prometheus histogram buckets (prometheus.DefBuckets).
- `headtotails_grpc_errors_total`: increments when handler paths call writeGRPCError() after upstream headscale failures.

## Production Monitoring Gaps

The current implementation provides request totals/latency and upstream gRPC error counts.
For stronger production monitoring, add:

- `headtotails_http_inflight_requests` gauge for saturation and concurrency.
- `headtotails_headscale_rpc_duration_seconds` histogram by gRPC method/code.
- `headtotails_headscale_rpc_requests_total` counter by gRPC method/code.
- `headtotails_oauth_token_requests_total` counter by result (`success`, `invalid_client`, `invalid_grant`).
- Optional request/response size histograms for payload growth and cost visibility.

## Starter Alerting and SLO Signals

- Error rate: `sum(rate(headtotails_requests_total{status=~"5.."}[5m])) / sum(rate(headtotails_requests_total[5m]))`
- Latency p95: `histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(headtotails_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])))`
- Upstream failures: `sum(rate(headtotails_grpc_errors_total[5m])) by (grpc_code)`
